mainText:
*Bank of Entitlement*: Where your unreasonable demands are always our top priority! Get ready to be pampered like the entitled royalty you are. 

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So there I was, strolling into my local Bank of Entitlement branch, ready to make a withdrawal of my usual weekly allowance-no big deal, right? Wrong. As I approached the teller, I noticed a new policy had been implemented: a limit on the amount of cash I could withdraw in one go. Me? Limited? I scoffed at the very idea. But being the generous soul that I am, I decided to give them the benefit of the doubt and politely asked the teller to remove the restrictions. The nerve of this bank to inconvenience me, Hot Josh, in such a way was simply unacceptable. The teller attempted to explain some nonsense about security measures and banking regulations, but I wasn't having any of it. With a dramatic flourish, I declared, "I demand to speak to the manager this instant!" Moments later, the manager arrived, looking slightly nervous but also intrigued by my bold presence. I proceeded to unleash a fiery tirade about how my status as a valued customer should exempt me from such trivial inconveniences. The other customers watched in awe as I defended my entitlement with passion and fervor. In the end, the manager caved under the weight of my unwavering entitlement and agreed to waive the withdrawal limit just for me. As I walked out of the bank, head held high and with my overflowing bag of cash in hand, I couldn't help but feel a sense of triumph. Another victory for Hot Josh, the true king of entitlement!
